global_scene_summary.primary_activity: Slow driving past a variety of retail and service establishments
global_scene_summary.atmospheric_conditions: Daylight, clear and sunny with slight haze
global_scene_summary.infrastructure_type: Mixed-use commercial buildings, narrow road with unpaved shoulders

objects_and_motion.camera_vehicle: Forward motion at a slow, steady pace
parked_vehicles: Motorcycle in front of Uttam Hospital (00:04)
Blue car parked on side street (00:08)
Two black motorcycles near hardware shops (frame_9)
pedestrians: Man talking on mobile phone near bricks (00:01)
static_objects: Large stacks of red clay bricks
Ceramic sinks and pedestals on sidewalk

scene_text_integration.industrial_zone: Text like 'SOCH SANITARYWARE' and 'S.K. Marble & Tiles' alongside physical piles of bricks confirms a construction/hardware hub.
scene_text_integration.healthcare_zone: The transition to 'Uttam Hospital' and later 'Braj Medical Store' indicates a central services district within the commercial area.
scene_text_integration.brand_identification: Global and local brands (Hindware, Asian Paints, Benelave) characterize the retail nature of the buildings.

navigation_reasoning.road_conditions: Narrow street with unpaved shoulders and encroachment by construction materials.
navigation_reasoning.hazards: Parked motorcycles and brick stacks reduce effective road width; pedestrians on the shoulder require driver vigilance.
navigation_reasoning.visibility: High visibility due to bright daylight, though solar glare is a minor factor.
